SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CustomerId], [t].[CustomerName], [t].[CustomerPhone], [t].[DeliveredAt], [t].[DeliveryAddress], [t].[DeliveryCity], [t].[DeliveryFee], [t].[DeliveryLatitude], [t].[DeliveryLongitude], [t].[DeliveryPinCode], [t].[Discount], [t].[EstimatedDeliveryAt], [t].[PaymentMethod], [t].[PaymentStatus], [t].[PaymentTransactionId], [t].[PlacedAt], [t].[RestaurantId], [t].[RestaurantName], [t].[SpecialInstructions], [t].[Status], [t].[SubTotal], [t].[Taxes], [t].[TotalAmount], [t].[UpdatedAt], [o0].[Id], [o0].[Customization], [o0].[ImageUrl], [o0].[MenuItemId], [o0].[Name], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalPrice], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o1].[Id], [o1].[Note], [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[Status], [o1].[Timestamp]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [o].[Id], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[CustomerName], [o].[CustomerPhone], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryCity], [o].[DeliveryFee], [o].[DeliveryLatitude], [o].[DeliveryLongitude], [o].[DeliveryPinCode], [o].[Discount], [o].[EstimatedDeliveryAt], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[PaymentStatus], [o].[PaymentTransactionId], [o].[PlacedAt], [o].[RestaurantId], [o].[RestaurantName], [o].[SpecialInstructions], [o].[Status], [o].[SubTotal], [o].[Taxes], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [OrderItems] AS [o0] ON [t].[Id] = [o0].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN [OrderStatusHistory] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [o0].[Id], [o1].[Timestamp]

    SELECT TOP(1) [o].[Id], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[CustomerName], [o].[CustomerPhone], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryCity], [o].[DeliveryFee], [o].[DeliveryLatitude], [o].[DeliveryLongitude], [o].[DeliveryPinCode], [o].[Discount], [o].[EstimatedDeliveryAt], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[PaymentStatus], [o].[PaymentTransactionId], [o].[PlacedAt], [o].[RestaurantId], [o].[RestaurantName], [o].[SpecialInstructions], [o].[Status], [o].[SubTotal], [o].[Taxes], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CustomerId], [t].[CustomerName], [t].[CustomerPhone], [t].[DeliveredAt], [t].[DeliveryAddress], [t].[DeliveryCity], [t].[DeliveryFee], [t].[DeliveryLatitude], [t].[DeliveryLongitude], [t].[DeliveryPinCode], [t].[Discount], [t].[EstimatedDeliveryAt], [t].[PaymentMethod], [t].[PaymentStatus], [t].[PaymentTransactionId], [t].[PlacedAt], [t].[RestaurantId], [t].[RestaurantName], [t].[SpecialInstructions], [t].[Status], [t].[SubTotal], [t].[Taxes], [t].[TotalAmount], [t].[UpdatedAt], [o0].[Id], [o0].[Customization], [o0].[ImageUrl], [o0].[MenuItemId], [o0].[Name], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalPrice], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o1].[Id], [o1].[Note], [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[Status], [o1].[Timestamp]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [o].[Id], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[CustomerName], [o].[CustomerPhone], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryCity], [o].[DeliveryFee], [o].[DeliveryLatitude], [o].[DeliveryLongitude], [o].[DeliveryPinCode], [o].[Discount], [o].[EstimatedDeliveryAt], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[PaymentStatus], [o].[PaymentTransactionId], [o].[PlacedAt], [o].[RestaurantId], [o].[RestaurantName], [o].[SpecialInstructions], [o].[Status], [o].[SubTotal], [o].[Taxes], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [OrderItems] AS [o0] ON [t].[Id] = [o0].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN [OrderStatusHistory] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [o0].[Id], [o1].[Timestamp]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CustomerId], [t].[CustomerName], [t].[CustomerPhone], [t].[DeliveredAt], [t].[DeliveryAddress], [t].[DeliveryCity], [t].[DeliveryFee], [t].[DeliveryLatitude], [t].[DeliveryLongitude], [t].[DeliveryPinCode], [t].[Discount], [t].[EstimatedDeliveryAt], [t].[PaymentMethod], [t].[PaymentStatus], [t].[PaymentTransactionId], [t].[PlacedAt], [t].[RestaurantId], [t].[RestaurantName], [t].[SpecialInstructions], [t].[Status], [t].[SubTotal], [t].[Taxes], [t].[TotalAmount], [t].[UpdatedAt], [o0].[Id], [o0].[Customization], [o0].[ImageUrl], [o0].[MenuItemId], [o0].[Name], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalPrice], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o1].[Id], [o1].[Note], [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[Status], [o1].[Timestamp]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [o].[Id], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[CustomerName], [o].[CustomerPhone], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryCity], [o].[DeliveryFee], [o].[DeliveryLatitude], [o].[DeliveryLongitude], [o].[DeliveryPinCode], [o].[Discount], [o].[EstimatedDeliveryAt], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[PaymentStatus], [o].[PaymentTransactionId], [o].[PlacedAt], [o].[RestaurantId], [o].[RestaurantName], [o].[SpecialInstructions], [o].[Status], [o].[SubTotal], [o].[Taxes], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [OrderItems] AS [o0] ON [t].[Id] = [o0].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN [OrderStatusHistory] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [o0].[Id], [o1].[Timestamp]

    WHERE [o].[Id] = @__id_0

SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[CustomerName], [o].[CustomerPhone], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryCity], [o].[DeliveryFee], [o].[DeliveryLatitude], [o].[DeliveryLongitude], [o].[DeliveryPinCode], [o].[Discount], [o].[EstimatedDeliveryAt], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[PaymentStatus], [o].[PaymentTransactionId], [o].[PlacedAt], [o].[RestaurantId], [o].[RestaurantName], [o].[SpecialInstructions], [o].[Status], [o].[SubTotal], [o].[Taxes], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt], [o0].[Id], [o0].[Customization], [o0].[ImageUrl], [o0].[MenuItemId], [o0].[Name], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalPrice], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o1].[Id], [o1].[Note], [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[Status], [o1].[Timestamp]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
LEFT JOIN [OrderItems] AS [o0] ON [o].[Id] = [o0].[OrderId]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CustomerId], [t].[CustomerName], [t].[CustomerPhone], [t].[DeliveredAt], [t].[DeliveryAddress], [t].[DeliveryCity], [t].[DeliveryFee], [t].[DeliveryLatitude], [t].[DeliveryLongitude], [t].[DeliveryPinCode], [t].[Discount], [t].[EstimatedDeliveryAt], [t].[PaymentMethod], [t].[PaymentStatus], [t].[PaymentTransactionId], [t].[PlacedAt], [t].[RestaurantId], [t].[RestaurantName], [t].[SpecialInstructions], [t].[Status], [t].[SubTotal], [t].[Taxes], [t].[TotalAmount], [t].[UpdatedAt], [o0].[Id], [o0].[Customization], [o0].[ImageUrl], [o0].[MenuItemId], [o0].[Name], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalPrice], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o1].[Id], [o1].[Note], [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[Status], [o1].[Timestamp]

    SELECT TOP(1) [o].[Id], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[CustomerName], [o].[CustomerPhone], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryCity], [o].[DeliveryFee], [o].[DeliveryLatitude], [o].[DeliveryLongitude], [o].[DeliveryPinCode], [o].[Discount], [o].[EstimatedDeliveryAt], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[PaymentStatus], [o].[PaymentTransactionId], [o].[PlacedAt], [o].[RestaurantId], [o].[RestaurantName], [o].[SpecialInstructions], [o].[Status], [o].[SubTotal], [o].[Taxes], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]

) AS [t]

    SELECT TOP(1) [o].[Id], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[CustomerName], [o].[CustomerPhone], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryCity], [o].[DeliveryFee], [o].[DeliveryLatitude], [o].[DeliveryLongitude], [o].[DeliveryPinCode], [o].[Discount], [o].[EstimatedDeliveryAt], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[PaymentStatus], [o].[PaymentTransactionId], [o].[PlacedAt], [o].[RestaurantId], [o].[RestaurantName], [o].[SpecialInstructions], [o].[Status], [o].[SubTotal], [o].[Taxes], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [OrderItems] AS [o0] ON [t].[Id] = [o0].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN [OrderStatusHistory] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [o0].[Id], [o1].[Timestamp]
